name: website-tech-detector
title: Website Tech Detector - BuiltWith & Wappalyzer Alt
description: Detect 80+ technologies on any website: frameworks (React, Vue, Angular, Next.js, Nuxt), CMS (WordPress, Shopify, Wix), analytics (Google Analytics, Hotjar, Segment), CDN (Cloudflare, Fastly), payments (Stripe, PayPal), marketing (HubSpot, Intercom), hosting (Vercel, Netlify, AWS). Free BuiltWith & Wappalyzer alternative. Bulk URL processing, JSON/CSV export. No API keys. From $0.01/URL. Perfect for competitive analysis, sales prospecting, and market research.
